name: Wave 2: runtime unblockers / app_ui / batch 3
description: Small focused packet for 4 open bug(s). Uses auto/* routing so Praxis can choose lower-cost admitted models where suitable.
outcome_goal: Drive BUG-A63D9317, BUG-AA6AC4E0, BUG-AAE46E22, BUG-F758C3D4 to proof-backed terminal outcomes or leave explicit blockers in CLOSEOUT.md.

token_policy.default_model_routing: explicit lower-cost openai/gpt-5.4-mini for plan/verify/contained packets; openai/gpt-5.4 only for core authority execution
token_policy.strong_model_only_when: authority design or invasive implementation genuinely requires it

anti_requirements: Do not widen beyond listed bug IDs.
Do not resolve FIXED without validates_fix evidence.
Do not use ad hoc SQL for bug status or evidence writes.
Do not create wrapper scripts for behavior that belongs in runtime, registry, event bus, or DB authority.
Use praxis workflow discover before implementing new code or patterns.

jobs.label: Plan app_ui packet
jobs.prompt:
Orient from Praxis.db standing orders first. Then use praxis workflow discover/recall as needed to plan this packet.

- BUG-A63D9317 [P2/ARCHITECTURE]: [hygiene-2026-04-23/connector-builder-authority] Connector registrar auto-imports filesystem clients and writes multiple registry projections
- BUG-AA6AC4E0 [P2/RUNTIME]: contract-drift::runtime/build_planning_contract.py
- BUG-AAE46E22 [P2/RUNTIME]: dep-audit::anthropic minor bump 0.86.0 -> 0.87.0 required (CVE-2026-34450, CVE-2026-34452)
- BUG-F758C3D4 [P2/WIRING]: Dev UI API cannot import generated connector artifacts from artifacts.connectors

Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-2-runtime-unblockers-app-ui-3/PLAN.md with: authority model, files to read, files allowed to change, verification path, stop boundary, and per-bug intended outcome. Do not edit code in this job.
